Name: Doctor Steven
Description: A scientist working at Alchemax Astrobiology department Lab who helped Eddie Brock with finding the cause of his symbiote violent behavior.
FirstComicDescription: "THE LAND BEFORE CRIME" Starts Here!Eddie Brock and the Venom symbiote have been reunited at last - and their hatred of Spider-Man is greater than ever!While hunting the friendly neighborhood wall-crawler, Venom comes face-to-face with none other than STEGRON THE DINOSAUR MAN!Can Venom postpone feasting on Spider-Man's brain long enough to stop Stegron from turning everyone in New York into a bloodthirsty dinosaur?!List of covers and their creators:CoverNameCreator(s)Sidebar LocationRegRegular CoverGurihiru1VarMary Jane Variant Edition CoverFrancesco Mattina & Fernanda Rizo2
